name: Fresh Herb, Lettuce, and Cucumber Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup cucumber slices, cut into semicircles
recipeInstructions:
1. On a platter, arrange the lettuce in a mound in the center.
2. Place the mint and cilantro on opposite sides of the lettuce mound, touching it.
3. Arrange the cucumber slices in a fan design, overlapping slightly along the edge of the platter.
4. Serve with spring rolls.
